audit_items.proof_trace: Column-level 50% threshold check (≥64/128 columns) does not guarantee per-blob 50% threshold. When columns contain different subsets of blobs, individual blobs may have <50% cells available even when total column count is sufficient, causing KZG recovery to fail or produce incorrect results.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker provides 64 columns where 40 columns contain blob A cells but only 32 contain blob B cells. Blob A recovers successfully, but blob B has only 25% cells (32/128), violating erasure coding threshold and potentially producing invalid recovered data.
